highlight-annotation-on-pdf-page.title: Add Highlight Annotation to PDF Page
highlight-annotation-on-pdf-page.description: Demonstrates how to insert a yellow highlight annotation over a specified rectangle on page three of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfContentEditor facade.

reposition-stamp-left-margin.title: Reposition Stamp on PDF Page to Left Margin
reposition-stamp-left-margin.description: Shows how to move an existing stamp on page 4 of a PDF so that it aligns with the left margin at a 10 mm offset using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

extract-first-image-from-pdf-page-2.title: Extract First Image from PDF Page 2 as PNG
extract-first-image-from-pdf-page-2.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor to extract the first image on page 2 of a PDF document and save it as a PNG file.

add-custom-project-metadata-to-pdf-xmp.title: Add Custom Project Metadata to PDF XMP
add-custom-project-metadata-to-pdf-xmp.description: Shows how to bind XMP metadata to an existing PDF, register a custom namespace, and add project ID and version fields using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

batch-extract-images-from-pdfs.title: Batch Extract Images from PDFs to Subfolders
batch-extract-images-from-pdfs.description: Shows how to process multiple PDF files, extract all embedded images with Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor, and save each set of images into a dedicated subfolder named after the source PDF.

remove-specific-attachment-from-pdf.title: Remove Specific Attachment from PDF
remove-specific-attachment-from-pdf.description: Shows how to extract all attachments from a PDF, delete them, and re‑add only the desired ones, effectively removing a specified attachment to reduce file size.

add-bookmark-to-pdf-page.title: Add Bookmark to PDF Page
add-bookmark-to-pdf-page.description: Shows how to add a bookmark titled "Project Overview" that navigates to page 5 of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

replace-invoicenumber-with-uuid-page-6.title: Replace InvoiceNumber with UUID on PDF Page 6
replace-invoicenumber-with-uuid-page-6.description: Shows how to load a PDF, generate a UUID, and replace the case‑sensitive text "InvoiceNumber" on a specific page using Aspose.Pdf's PdfContentEditor.

convert-jpeg-to-pdf.title: Convert JPEG Image to PDF
convert-jpeg-to-pdf.description: Shows how to create a PDF document, add a page, insert a JPEG image, and save it as a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

check-checkbox-field-in-pdf-form.title: Check Checkbox Field in PDF Form
check-checkbox-field-in-pdf-form.description: Shows how to programmatically set the 'TermsAccepted' checkbox to true in a PDF form using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

replace-text-in-pdf-annotations.title: Replace Text in PDF Annotations on Specific Pages
replace-text-in-pdf-annotations.description: Shows how to find and replace specific text inside text annotations (sticky notes) on selected PDF pages using Aspose.Pdf.

add-hyperlink-to-pdf-page.title: Add Hyperlink to PDF Page Using PdfContentEditor
add-hyperlink-to-pdf-page.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfContentEditor to insert a clickable web link on a specific page of an existing PDF and save the modified document.

batch-set-pdf-viewer-preference-full-scr.title: Batch Set PDF Viewer Preference to Full‑Screen Mode
batch-set-pdf-viewer-preference-full-scr.description: Shows how to iterate over all PDF files in a directory and use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfContentEditor to set each document's viewer preference to full‑screen mode.

add-image-stamp-to-page-three.title: Add Image Stamp to Bottom‑Right of Page 3
add-image-stamp-to-page-three.description: Demonstrates using Aspose.Pdf facades to place a PNG logo as an image stamp at the bottom‑right corner of the third page of a PDF document.

add-javascript-action-to-pdf-form-button.title: Add JavaScript Action to PDF Form Button
add-javascript-action-to-pdf-form-button.description: Demonstrates how to attach a JavaScript calculation to a button field in a PDF form using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.FormEditor.

add-javascript-click-action-to-pdf-recta.title: Add JavaScript Click Action to PDF Rectangle
add-javascript-click-action-to-pdf-recta.description: Shows how to create a rectangular annotation with a JavaScript click action that displays an alert, using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

add-document-attachment-to-pdf.title: Add Document Attachment to PDF
add-document-attachment-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to attach an external file (Terms.pdf) to an existing PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfContentEditor without creating a visible annotation.

add-document-attachment-with-mime-type.title: Add Document Attachment to PDF with Custom MIME Type
add-document-attachment-with-mime-type.description: This example shows how to attach an external PDF file to an existing PDF document using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfContentEditor, providing a custom MIME type and description for the attachment.

set-pdf-permissions-allow-copy-disallow-.title: Set PDF Permissions to Allow Copy and Block Form Editing
set-pdf-permissions-allow-copy-disallow-.description: Shows how to protect a PDF with Aspose.Pdf.Facades by allowing text/graphics copying while preventing form field changes and annotation modifications.

add-red-rectangle-annotation-to-pdf-page.title: Add Red Rectangle Annotation to PDF Page
add-red-rectangle-annotation-to-pdf-page.description: Shows how to place a red rectangle annotation with a 2 mm border thickness on a specific PDF page using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

add-page-open-javascript-logging.title: Add Page‑Open JavaScript Logging to PDF
add-page-open-javascript-logging.description: Shows how to attach a JavaScript action to each PDF page that logs the current page number when the page is opened, using Aspose.Pdf core API together with the PdfContentEditor facade.

silently-print-pdf-to-network-printer.title: Silently Print PDF to a Network Printer
silently-print-pdf-to-network-printer.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf to bind a PDF file and send it to a network printer via its UNC path without showing any print dialogs.

convert-pdf-to-multi-page-tiff-lzw.title: Convert PDF to Multi‑Page TIFF with LZW Compression
convert-pdf-to-multi-page-tiff-lzw.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades to convert an entire PDF document into a single multi‑page TIFF file while applying LZW compression.

create-nested-pdf-bookmarks.title: Create Nested PDF Bookmarks (3 Levels)
create-nested-pdf-bookmarks.description: Demonstrates building a three‑level bookmark hierarchy (section, subsection, sub‑subsection) and adding it to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

add-rotated-image-stamp-to-pdf.title: Add Rotated Image Stamp to PDF
add-rotated-image-stamp-to-pdf.description: Shows how to place an image stamp with 45° rotation, 0.8 opacity, at coordinates (100,200) on all pages of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

extract-images-from-pdf.title: Extract Images from PDF using PdfExtractor
extract-images-from-pdf.description: Shows how to extract all images from a PDF document and save them as PNG files using Aspose.Pdf's PdfExtractor facade.

remove-specific-bookmark-from-pdf.title: Remove Specific Bookmark from PDF
remove-specific-bookmark-from-pdf.description: Shows how to delete a bookmark with a given title from a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf's PdfBookmarkEditor and save the modified file.

batch-add-red-rectangle-annotation.title: Batch Add Red Rectangle Annotation to PDFs
batch-add-red-rectangle-annotation.description: Shows how to iterate over all PDF files in a folder and add a red square (rectangle) annotation to every page using the PdfAnnotationEditor facade.

extract-pdf-viewer-preferences-to-json.title: Extract PDF Viewer Preferences and Save Layout/Zoom to JSON
extract-pdf-viewer-preferences-to-json.description: Demonstrates how to read a PDF's viewer preference flags and current zoom factor using Aspose.Pdf.Facades, then store the page layout and zoom values in a JSON configuration file.

add-base64-image-stamp-to-pdf-page.title: Add Base64 Image Stamp to PDF Page
add-base64-image-stamp-to-pdf-page.description: Demonstrates how to decode a Base64‑encoded image, create an ImageStamp, and place it on the third page of a PDF at a 50 mm offset.

add-confidential-text-stamp.title: Add Confidential Red Text Stamp with Transparency
add-confidential-text-stamp.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF, create a red "Confidential" text stamp with 50% opacity, and apply it to every page using Aspose.Pdf.

create-nested-bookmarks-pdf.title: Create Nested Bookmarks in PDF using PdfContentEditor
create-nested-bookmarks-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to add a parent bookmark and child subsections to a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf's PdfContentEditor class.

add-xmp-metadata-author-title.title: Add XMP Metadata (Author and Title) to PDF
add-xmp-metadata-author-title.description: Demonstrates how to bind an existing PDF, set XMP author and title fields, and save the document with updated metadata using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

add-file-attachment-data-relationship.title: Add File Attachment with Data Relationship to PDF
add-file-attachment-data-relationship.description: Shows how to add a file attachment annotation to a PDF page using PdfContentEditor and set its AFRelationship to Data for improved document organization.

extract-images-from-pdf-by-page-index.title: Extract Images from PDF with Page and Index Naming
extract-images-from-pdf-by-page-index.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf's PdfExtractor to pull all images from each PDF page and save them as PNG files named with the page number and image index.

set-pdf-viewer-preference-single-page-zo.title: Set PDF Viewer Preference to Single Page Layout with 100% Zoom
set-pdf-viewer-preference-single-page-zo.description: Demonstrates how to configure a PDF's viewer preferences to use a single‑page continuous layout and set the default zoom level to 100 % using Aspose.Pdf facades.

batch-replace-confidential-with-public-p.title: Batch Replace 'Confidential' with 'Public' in PDFs
batch-replace-confidential-with-public-p.description: Loads each PDF from an input folder, uses Aspose.Pdf's PdfContentEditor to replace every occurrence of the word "Confidential" with "Public", and saves the modified files to an output folder.

extract-grayscale-images-page-5.title: Extract Grayscale Images from PDF Page 5
extract-grayscale-images-page-5.description: Loads a PDF, converts page 5 to grayscale, extracts all images from that page, and saves them as JPEG files.

password-protect-pdf-disable-printing.title: Password Protect PDF and Disable Printing
password-protect-pdf-disable-printing.description: Demonstrates encrypting a PDF with a user and owner password while forbidding all permissions, including printing, using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

read-pdf-viewer-preferences-zoom.title: Read PDF Viewer Preferences and Zoom Settings
read-pdf-viewer-preferences-zoom.description: Shows how to obtain viewer preferences such as page layout and hide‑menubar flag, and retrieve the default zoom factor of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

set-shippingmethod-radio-button-express.title: Set Radio Button 'ShippingMethod' to Express in PDF
set-shippingmethod-radio-button-express.description: Demonstrates how to bind an existing PDF, select the "Express" option for the "ShippingMethod" radio button in the AcroForm, and save the updated document using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

convert-pdf-page-to-high-resolution-png.title: Convert PDF Page to High-Resolution PNG
convert-pdf-page-to-high-resolution-png.description: Shows how to extract a single page from a PDF and save it as a 300 DPI PNG image using Aspose.Pdf.

populate-pdf-form-from-json.title: Populate PDF Form Fields from JSON using Aspose.Pdf.Facades
populate-pdf-form-from-json.description: Shows how to load a PDF form, read a JSON file that maps field names to values, fill each form field with the corresponding value using Aspose.Pdf.Facades, and save the updated PDF.

center-image-stamp-on-page.title: Center Image Stamp on Specific PDF Page
center-image-stamp-on-page.description: Shows how to place an image stamp at the center of page 8 of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf Facades APIs.

batch-add-password-protection-to-pdfs.title: Batch Add Password Protection to PDFs
batch-add-password-protection-to-pdfs.description: Shows how to iterate over all PDF files in a folder and apply the same user password to each using Aspose.Pdf's PdfFileSecurity facade.

remove-attachments-by-pattern-from-pdf.title: Remove Attachments Matching Pattern from PDF
remove-attachments-by-pattern-from-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to delete embedded file attachments from a PDF whose names end with a specific pattern (e.g., "_old.pdf") using Aspose.Pdf facades.

set-pdf-viewer-preferences-thumbnails-fi.title: Set PDF Viewer Preferences to Show Thumbnails and Fit Width
set-pdf-viewer-preferences-thumbnails-fi.description: Demonstrates using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfContentEditor to configure viewer preferences so the PDF opens with the thumbnails pane visible and the window sized to fit the page width.

add-file-attachment-with-creation-date.title: Add File Attachment with Current Creation Date to PDF
add-file-attachment-with-creation-date.description: Demonstrates how to attach an external PDF file to a page using PdfContentEditor and set its creation date to the current system time.

add-help-bookmark-with-url.title: Add Help Bookmark with URL to PDF
add-help-bookmark-with-url.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades to add a bookmark named "Help" that opens an external documentation URL when clicked, and then save the updated PDF.

batch-reposition-stamps-top-center.title: Batch Reposition Stamps to Top‑Center of PDF Pages
batch-reposition-stamps-top-center.description: Processes all PDF files in a folder, reads each page size, and moves every existing stamp to the top‑center of its page using Aspose.Pdf's content editor, then saves the modified files.

add-attachment-with-description-to-pdf.title: Add Attachment with Description to PDF
add-attachment-with-description-to-pdf.description: Shows how to embed an external file into a PDF and assign a descriptive label using Aspose.Pdf.Facades PdfContentEditor.

add-encrypted-attachment-aes.title: Add Encrypted Attachment and Secure PDF with AES
add-encrypted-attachment-aes.description: Demonstrates how to attach a file to a PDF with a custom description using PdfContentEditor, then encrypt the resulting PDF with AES‑256 using the Document class.

add-rectangle-annotation-light-gray.title: Add Rectangle Annotation with Light Gray Fill to PDF
add-rectangle-annotation-light-gray.description: Shows how to place a square (rectangle) annotation on a PDF page with a custom light gray interior color and a 1 pt border using Aspose.Pdf Facades.

print-pdf-default-printer-two-copies-lan.title: Print PDF to Default Printer with Two Copies Landscape
print-pdf-default-printer-two-copies-lan.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf's PdfViewer to print a PDF to the system's default printer while specifying two copies and landscape orientation.

add-custom-xmp-metadata-field-to-pdf.title: Add Custom XMP Metadata Field to PDF
add-custom-xmp-metadata-field-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to add a custom XMP metadata entry (ProjectID) to a PDF and verify it appears in the document properties using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

add-external-url-bookmark-to-pdf.title: Add External URL Bookmark to PDF
add-external-url-bookmark-to-pdf.description: Shows how to bind an existing PDF, create a bookmark that opens an external URL, and save the updated document using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

replace-dates-pdf-regex.title: Replace Dates in PDF Using Regex (MM/DD/YYYY to YYYY-MM-DD)
replace-dates-pdf-regex.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf's PdfContentEditor with a regular‑expression replace‑text strategy to convert dates from MM/DD/YYYY to YYYY‑MM‑DD across all pages of a PDF.

convert-pdf-to-progressive-jpeg-150-dpi.title: Convert PDF Pages to Progressive JPEG Images at 150 DPI
convert-pdf-to-progressive-jpeg-150-dpi.description: Demonstrates using Aspose.Pdf's PdfConverter facade to transform each page of a PDF into JPEG images with 150 DPI resolution for web-friendly output.

add-unicode-attachment-description-to-pd.title: Add Document Attachment with Unicode Description to PDF
add-unicode-attachment-description-to-pd.description: Shows how to embed a file attachment into a PDF with a Unicode description (including Cyrillic characters and an emoji) using Aspose.Pdf, then extract and display the attachment metadata to confirm correct encoding.

convert-pdf-pages-to-transparent-png-150.title: Convert PDF Pages to Transparent PNG Images at 150 DPI
convert-pdf-pages-to-transparent-png-150.description: Demonstrates how to batch convert each page of a PDF document to a PNG image with a transparent background at 150 DPI using Aspose.Pdf.

embed-memory-stream-pdf-attachment.title: Embed Memory Stream as PDF Attachment using PdfContentEditor
embed-memory-stream-pdf-attachment.description: Shows how to create a PDF in memory, attach a file from a MemoryStream using PdfContentEditor, and save the result with cross‑platform GDI+ handling.

add-javascript-calculate-action-to-pdf-f.title: Add JavaScript Calculate Action to PDF Form
add-javascript-calculate-action-to-pdf-f.description: Demonstrates how to bind an existing PDF, inject a JavaScript Calculate action that multiplies Quantity and Price fields and stores the result in a Total field, and save the modified document.

print-pdf-duplex-collated-copies.title: Print PDF with Duplex and Collated Copies
print-pdf-duplex-collated-copies.description: Demonstrates how to send a PDF to the default printer with duplex (double‑sided) printing enabled and collated multiple copies using Aspose.Pdf facades.

read-pdf-viewer-preferences.title: Read PDF Viewer Preferences
read-pdf-viewer-preferences.description: Shows how to load a PDF with PdfContentEditor, retrieve its viewer preference flags, and output each enabled preference to the console.

add-sticky-note-annotation-to-first-page.title: Add Sticky Note Annotation to First PDF Page
add-sticky-note-annotation-to-first-page.description: Shows how to place a sticky note (text annotation) on the first page of a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

convert-pdf-pages-to-png-transparent.title: Convert PDF Pages 2‑4 to PNG with Transparent Background
convert-pdf-pages-to-png-transparent.description: Loads a PDF, sets a 200 DPI resolution, and uses Aspose.Pdf's PngDevice to render pages 2 through 4 as PNG images with a transparent background.

retrieve-viewer-preferences-after-edits.title: Retrieve Viewer Preferences After Incremental PDF Edits
retrieve-viewer-preferences-after-edits.description: Demonstrates how to change PDF viewer preferences with PdfContentEditor, retrieve the current preferences after each change, and save the document using incremental updates.

encrypt-pdf-128-aes-restrict-print-edit.title: Encrypt PDF with 128‑bit AES and Restrict Print/Edit
encrypt-pdf-128-aes-restrict-print-edit.description: Demonstrates applying 128‑bit AES encryption to a PDF and disabling printing and content modification using Aspose.Pdf.

remove-all-bookmarks-from-pdf.title: Remove All Bookmarks from PDF
remove-all-bookmarks-from-pdf.description: Shows how to delete every bookmark in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfBookmarkEditor and save the cleaned document.

replace-text-in-pdf.title: Replace Text in PDF with PdfContentEditor
replace-text-in-pdf.description: Shows how to load a PDF, replace every occurrence of the word "Draft" with "Final" using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfContentEditor, and save the updated document.

add-multiline-text-stamp-to-pdf-pages.title: Add Multiline Text Stamp to PDF Pages
add-multiline-text-stamp-to-pdf-pages.description: Demonstrates how to create a TextStamp with custom font, size, color and multiline text, and apply it to all pages of a PDF document.

add-image-stamp-to-specific-pdf-page.title: Add Image Stamp to Specific PDF Page
add-image-stamp-to-specific-pdf-page.description: Shows how to create an image‑based stamp, set its size, position, opacity, and apply it only to the second page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

fill-acroform-text-field.title: Fill AcroForm Text Field Using Aspose PDF Form Facade
fill-acroform-text-field.description: Demonstrates how to locate an AcroForm text field named "CustomerName" in a PDF and populate it with the value "Acme Corporation" using the Aspose.Pdf.Facades.Form class.

stamp-image-from-memory-stream.title: Stamp Image onto PDF from Memory Stream
stamp-image-from-memory-stream.description: Demonstrates how to add an image stamp to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf without writing the image to disk, by loading the image into a MemoryStream and applying it to all pages.

hide-scrollbars-disable-page-transitions.title: Hide Scrollbars and Disable Page Transitions in PDF
hide-scrollbars-disable-page-transitions.description: Demonstrates how to remove page transition effects and hide UI elements such as scrollbars by using PdfPageEditor and PdfContentEditor from Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

delete-all-attachments-from-pdf.title: Delete All Attachments from PDF and Verify Count
delete-all-attachments-from-pdf.description: The example removes every embedded file from a PDF using PdfContentEditor, saves the result, and then confirms that the attachment list is empty with PdfExtractor.

convert-pdf-to-png-thumbnails-300-dpi.title: Convert PDF Pages to PNG Thumbnails with 300 DPI and Transparent Background
convert-pdf-to-png-thumbnails-300-dpi.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, rendering each page to a 300 DPI PNG image, and enabling a transparent background for UI thumbnails using Aspose.Pdf.

update-pdf-creator-metadata-xmp.title: Update PDF Creator Metadata Using XMP Facade
update-pdf-creator-metadata-xmp.description: Shows how to load existing XMP metadata from a PDF, change the dc:creator field, and save the modified document using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

set-pdf-viewer-preference-use-outlines.title: Set PDF Viewer Preference to Show Outline Panel
set-pdf-viewer-preference-use-outlines.description: Shows how to configure the PDF viewer preference so the document outline (bookmarks) panel is displayed by default using Aspose.Pdf.

batch-apply-js-alert-to-rectangle-annota.title: Batch Apply JavaScript Alert to Rectangle Annotations
batch-apply-js-alert-to-rectangle-annota.description: Shows how to process several PDF files, find rectangle (square) annotations on each page, and attach a JavaScript alert action using Aspose.Pdf's PdfContentEditor facade.

fill-pdf-acroform-from-xml.title: Fill PDF AcroForm Fields from XML using XPath
fill-pdf-acroform-from-xml.description: Shows how to load an XML file, locate values with XPath, and populate matching AcroForm fields in a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf.

add-javascript-validation-button-to-pdf-.title: Add JavaScript Validation Button to PDF Form
add-javascript-validation-button-to-pdf-.description: Shows how to insert a push button into a PDF form and attach JavaScript that checks required fields and displays an alert if any are missing.

apply-viewer-preference-from-json.title: Apply Viewer Preference Settings to PDFs from JSON
apply-viewer-preference-from-json.description: Demonstrates reading a JSON configuration file and applying viewer preference flags to multiple PDF documents using Aspose.Pdf's PdfContentEditor.

extract-images-create-thumbnail-catalog.title: Extract Images from PDF and Create Thumbnail Catalog
extract-images-create-thumbnail-catalog.description: Shows how to extract all images from an existing PDF using PdfExtractor and then build a new PDF that presents each image as a thumbnail with a caption.

add-image-stamp-from-url-to-pdf-page.title: Add Image Stamp from URL to Specific PDF Page
add-image-stamp-from-url-to-pdf-page.description: Demonstrates downloading an image from an external URL and applying it as a stamp on page two of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

set-pdf-viewer-preferences-hide-toolbar-.title: Set PDF Viewer Preferences to Hide Toolbar and Menu Bar
set-pdf-viewer-preferences-hide-toolbar-.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf's PdfContentEditor facade to set viewer preferences that hide the toolbar and menu bar when the PDF is opened.

print-pdf-custom-page-ranges.title: Print PDF with Custom Page Ranges (1‑5 and 8‑10)
print-pdf-custom-page-ranges.description: Shows how to print specific page ranges of a PDF (pages 1‑5 and 8‑10) using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfViewer together with printer and page settings.

refresh-pdf-attachments.title: Refresh PDF Attachments by Removing and Adding Files
refresh-pdf-attachments.description: Demonstrates how to delete all existing attachments from a PDF and then attach a new set of files using Aspose.Pdf's PdfContentEditor facade.

add-text-annotation-to-pdf-page.title: Add Text Annotation to PDF Page
add-text-annotation-to-pdf-page.description: Demonstrates how to add a sticky‑note text annotation at a specific location on the first page of a PDF using the PdfContentEditor facade.

convert-png-images-to-multi-page-pdf.title: Convert PNG Images to Multi‑Page PDF
convert-png-images-to-multi-page-pdf.description: Shows how to read PNG files from a folder, add each image to a separate PDF page, and save the resulting multi‑page PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

fill-pdf-form-fields-from-json.title: Fill PDF Form Fields with Default Values from JSON
fill-pdf-form-fields-from-json.description: Demonstrates loading default field values from a JSON configuration file and populating matching fields in a PDF form using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

merge-jpeg-images-into-pdf.title: Merge JPEG Images into a Single PDF
merge-jpeg-images-into-pdf.description: Shows how to combine multiple JPEG files into one PDF document, adding each image to a separate page using Aspose.Pdf.

add-semi-transparent-stamp-annotation.title: Add Semi-Transparent Stamp Annotation to PDF Page
add-semi-transparent-stamp-annotation.description: Shows how to place a stamp annotation with 60% opacity on the third page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

add-dashed-rectangle-annotation-opacity.title: Add Dashed Rectangle Annotation with 50% Opacity to PDF Page
add-dashed-rectangle-annotation-opacity.description: Demonstrates how to add a rectangle (square) annotation on page six of a PDF, set its border to a dashed style, and apply 50% opacity using Aspose.Pdf.

add-green-circle-annotation-to-pdf-page.title: Add Green Circle Annotation to PDF Page
add-green-circle-annotation-to-pdf-page.description: Demonstrates how to add a circular annotation with a green fill and a 3‑point border to the second page of an existing PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

convert-pdf-pages-to-bmp.title: Convert PDF Pages to 24‑bit BMP Images
convert-pdf-pages-to-bmp.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfConverter to extract each PDF page and save it as a 24‑bit BMP file for legacy system compatibility.

add-confirmation-dialog-to-pdf-submit-bu.title: Add Confirmation Dialog to PDF Submit Button
add-confirmation-dialog-to-pdf-submit-bu.description: Shows how to insert a submit button into a PDF form and attach JavaScript that displays a confirmation dialog before the form is submitted using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

add-stamp-annotation-opacity.title: Add Stamp Annotation with Opacity to PDF
add-stamp-annotation-opacity.description: Shows how to load a PDF, create a rubber‑stamp annotation, set its opacity to 0.75, and save the modified document.

add-rectangle-annotation-with-dash-opaci.title: Add Rectangle Annotation with Custom Dash and Opacity
add-rectangle-annotation-with-dash-opaci.description: Shows how to place a rectangle (square) annotation on the first page of a PDF, set its opacity to 75% and apply a custom dash pattern using Aspose.Pdf.

add-attachment-verify-extraction.title: Add Attachment to PDF and Verify Extraction
add-attachment-verify-extraction.description: Demonstrates how to embed a file as a document attachment using PdfContentEditor, then extract it with PdfExtractor and compare the extracted bytes to the original file to confirm integrity.

add-multiple-annotations-to-pdf.title: Add Multiple Annotations to PDF in Batch
add-multiple-annotations-to-pdf.description: Shows how to load a PDF, define a list of text and highlight annotations, add them to specific pages in a loop, and save the updated document using Aspose.Pdf.

attach-network-downloaded-file-to-pdf.title: Attach Network-Downloaded File to PDF Using Aspose.Pdf
attach-network-downloaded-file-to-pdf.description: The example downloads a file as a byte array, creates an in‑memory PDF, and uses PdfContentEditor to embed the downloaded data as a document attachment.

add-underlined-yellow-text-stamp-to-pdf-.title: Add Underlined Yellow Text Stamp to PDF Page
add-underlined-yellow-text-stamp-to-pdf-.description: Demonstrates how to place a centered, underlined text stamp with a yellow background on page 10 of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

add-file-attachment-to-pdf.title: Add File Attachment to PDF with PdfContentEditor
add-file-attachment-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to attach a local file to an existing PDF document using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfContentEditor without creating a visible annotation.

add-dashed-line-annotation.title: Add Dashed Line Annotation to PDF
add-dashed-line-annotation.description: Demonstrates using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfContentEditor to create a line annotation with a custom dash pattern for highlighting a workflow step in a PDF document.

set-centerwindow-viewer-preference.title: Set CenterWindow Viewer Preference for PDF
set-centerwindow-viewer-preference.description: Demonstrates how to enable the CenterWindow viewer preference so that a PDF opens centered on the screen using Aspose.Pdf's PdfContentEditor facade.

hide-pdf-toolbar.title: Hide PDF Toolbar Using Viewer Preference
hide-pdf-toolbar.description: Shows how to set the HideToolbar viewer preference on a PDF with Aspose.Pdf.Facades so the toolbar is hidden when the document opens.

add-image-stamp-from-memory-stream.title: Add Image Stamp from Memory Stream and Scale to 50%
add-image-stamp-from-memory-stream.description: Shows how to load an image into a MemoryStream, create an ImageStamp, set its zoom to 50%, and add the stamp to every page of a PDF document.

hide-scrollbars-ui-pdf.title: Hide Scrollbars and UI Elements in PDF
hide-scrollbars-ui-pdf.description: Demonstrates using PdfContentEditor to set the HideWindowUI viewer preference, producing a PDF without scrollbars, toolbars, or menu bars for a cleaner display on small‑screen devices.

add-document-attachment-to-pdf__v2.title: Add Document Attachment to PDF without Removing Existing Attachments
add-document-attachment-to-pdf__v2.description: Demonstrates how to add a new file attachment to an existing PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfContentEditor while preserving any attachments already present.

assign-subject-to-pdf-sticky-note.title: Assign Subject to PDF Sticky Note Annotation
assign-subject-to-pdf-sticky-note.description: Demonstrates creating a TextAnnotation (sticky note) on a PDF page, setting its Subject property for searchable categorization, and saving the modified document.

toggle-fullscreen-viewer-preference.title: Toggle FullScreen Viewer Preference in PDF
toggle-fullscreen-viewer-preference.description: Shows how to enable or disable the FullScreen viewer preference of a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

add-and-verify-document-attachment.title: Add and Verify Document Attachment in PDF
add-and-verify-document-attachment.description: Demonstrates how to attach a file to a PDF using PdfContentEditor and then retrieve the attachment's file specification name with PdfExtractor for verification.

add-attachment-set-modification-date.title: Add Attachment and Set Modification Date in PDF
add-attachment-set-modification-date.description: Shows how to attach a file to a PDF using PdfContentEditor and update the document's modification date to the current UTC timestamp for auditing purposes.

set-pdf-fullscreen-viewer-preference.title: Set PDF Full‑Screen Viewer Preference
set-pdf-fullscreen-viewer-preference.description: Demonstrates how to enable the full‑screen viewer mode for a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfContentEditor.

add-javascript-alert-annotation-to-pdf.title: Add JavaScript Alert Annotation to PDF
add-javascript-alert-annotation-to-pdf.description: Shows how to create a JavaScript link annotation that displays an alert when clicked, using Aspose.Pdf's PdfContentEditor.

encrypt-pdf-attachment-and-add-to-pdf.title: Encrypt PDF Attachment and Add to PDF
encrypt-pdf-attachment-and-add-to-pdf.description: Shows how to encrypt a PDF file with a password using PdfFileSecurity and then attach the encrypted file to another PDF with PdfContentEditor.

replace-text-preserve-font.title: Replace Text While Preserving Font in PDF
replace-text-preserve-font.description: Demonstrates how to replace specific text in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfContentEditor while keeping the original font style, size, and color on the affected pages.

move-last-page-to-beginning.title: Move Last Page to Beginning of PDF
move-last-page-to-beginning.description: Shows how to reorder a PDF by inserting the last page at the start of the document and then deleting its original occurrence using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

add-text-stamp-with-shadow.title: Add Text Stamp with Shadow to PDF Page
add-text-stamp-with-shadow.description: Shows how to place a text stamp with a shadow effect at the top of the first page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

add-text-annotation-with-author-metadata.title: Add Text Annotation with Author Metadata to PDF
add-text-annotation-with-author-metadata.description: Demonstrates how to add a sticky‑note text annotation to a PDF and set the author as the annotation title using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

add-corporate-branding-xmp-metadata.title: Add Corporate Branding XMP Metadata to PDF
add-corporate-branding-xmp-metadata.description: Demonstrates how to register a custom XMP namespace and add corporate branding information such as a logo URL and brand color to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

extract-pdf-viewer-preferences-to-xml.title: Extract PDF Viewer Preferences and Save to XML
extract-pdf-viewer-preferences-to-xml.description: The example opens a PDF using PdfContentEditor, reads the viewer preference flags via GetViewerPreference, and writes the raw value along with each set flag to an XML configuration file.

add-department-xmp-metadata-to-pdf.title: Add Department XMP Metadata to PDF
add-department-xmp-metadata-to-pdf.description: Shows how to bind an existing PDF, add a custom XMP property named Department with the value Finance, and save the updated file using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

add-multiline-right-aligned-text-stamp-p.title: Add Multiline Right-Aligned Text Stamp to Page 4
add-multiline-right-aligned-text-stamp-p.description: Demonstrates creating a multiline TextStamp, aligning it to the right and bottom, and placing it on the fourth page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

insert-blank-page-add-header.title: Insert Blank Page and Add Header to PDF
insert-blank-page-add-header.description: Loads a PDF, inserts an empty page at the third position, and adds a centered header to every page using a TextStamp.

batch-add-attachment-to-pdfs.title: Batch Add Attachment to PDFs
batch-add-attachment-to-pdfs.description: Shows how to iterate over PDF files in a folder and attach the same external file to each document using Aspose.Pdf.

export-modified-pdf-to-memory-stream.title: Export Modified PDF to Memory Stream using PdfPageEditor
export-modified-pdf-to-memory-stream.description: Loads a PDF, changes its zoom level with PdfPageEditor, and saves the edited document directly to a MemoryStream for further processing.

disable-zoom-controls-set-fixed-zoom.title: Disable Zoom Controls and Set Fixed Zoom Level in PDF
disable-zoom-controls-set-fixed-zoom.description: Shows how to hide PDF viewer UI elements (including zoom controls) and apply a fixed zoom level using Aspose.Pdf facades.

validate-pdf-integrity-after-adding-marg.title: Validate PDF Integrity After Adding Margins
validate-pdf-integrity-after-adding-marg.description: Demonstrates how to edit a PDF with PdfFileEditor (adding uniform margins) and then verify the document's integrity by comparing SHA‑256 checksums of the original and edited files.

hide-pdf-navigation-panels-use-none.title: Hide PDF Navigation Panels by Setting Viewer Preference to UseNone
hide-pdf-navigation-panels-use-none.description: Demonstrates how to set the PageMode viewer preference to UseNone using PdfContentEditor, which hides all navigation panels when the PDF is opened.

add-square-annotation-red-border.title: Add Square Annotation with Red Border to PDF
add-square-annotation-red-border.description: Demonstrates how to add a square annotation with a red border and semi‑transparent fill to page 5 of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

apply-viewer-preferences-to-decrypted-pd.title: Apply Viewer Preferences to Decrypted PDF
apply-viewer-preferences-to-decrypted-pd.description: The example opens an encrypted PDF using the correct password, decrypts it in memory, sets viewer preferences such as hiding the menu bar and disabling page mode, and saves the modified document.

add-large-attachment-to-pdf-monitor-memo.title: Add Large Attachment to PDF and Monitor Memory Usage
add-large-attachment-to-pdf-monitor-memo.description: Demonstrates adding a >10 MB file as a PDF attachment using the Facades API while measuring memory consumption to ensure it stays within a defined limit.

decrypt-edit-reencrypt-protected-pdf.title: Decrypt, Edit, and Re‑encrypt a Password‑Protected PDF
decrypt-edit-reencrypt-protected-pdf.description: Shows how to open an encrypted PDF using the owner password, modify its content by adding a text annotation, and then re‑encrypt the document with a user password and specific permissions.

replace-text-pdf-using-pdfcontenteditor.title: Replace Text in PDF Using PdfContentEditor with Automatic Disposal
replace-text-pdf-using-pdfcontenteditor.description: Demonstrates how to replace text in a PDF file using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfContentEditor and automatically dispose the editor with a using statement.

hide-menubar-viewer-preference.title: Hide Menu Bar Using PDF Viewer Preference
hide-menubar-viewer-preference.description: Demonstrates how to enable the HideMenubar viewer preference so the PDF opens without a menu bar using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

add-large-stream-attachment-to-pdf.title: Add Large Stream Attachment to PDF with Low Memory Usage
add-large-stream-attachment-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to attach a large file to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfContentEditor while streaming the attachment to keep memory consumption low.

add-circle-annotation-green-outline.title: Add Circle Annotation with Green Outline to PDF Page
add-circle-annotation-green-outline.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfContentEditor to place a circular annotation with a thick green border around a diagram on page 6 of a PDF document.

add-document-attachment-with-error-handl.title: Add Document Attachment to PDF with Error Handling
add-document-attachment-with-error-handl.description: Demonstrates how to attach an external file to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfContentEditor while checking for missing source or attachment files and handling exceptions.

create-dashed-border-rectangle-annotatio.title: Create Dashed Border for Rectangle Annotation
create-dashed-border-rectangle-annotatio.description: Shows how to add a square (rectangle) annotation with a custom dashed border to a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf.

add-attachment-with-custom-mime-type.title: Add Attachment with Custom MIME Type to PDF
add-attachment-with-custom-mime-type.description: Demonstrates how to embed a file into a PDF and specify a custom MIME type using Aspose.Pdf.

interactive-pdf-viewer-preference-editor.title: Interactive PDF Viewer Preference Editor
interactive-pdf-viewer-preference-editor.description: Shows how to read a PDF's viewer preference flags using Aspose.Pdf, let the user toggle them via a console UI, and save the modified preferences back to the document.

add-popup-annotation-to-pdf.title: Add Popup Annotation to PDF
add-popup-annotation-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to create a popup annotation that displays a note when the user hovers over a defined area using Aspose.Pdf's PdfContentEditor facade.

add-embedded-file-attachment-to-pdf.title: Add Embedded File Attachment to PDF
add-embedded-file-attachment-to-pdf.description: Shows how to embed a file as an attachment in a PDF document using the PdfContentEditor facade.

add-file-attachment-link-annotation.title: Add File Attachment Link Annotation to PDF
add-file-attachment-link-annotation.description: Demonstrates how to add a clickable file‑attachment annotation that opens an attached PDF when the user clicks the annotation area, using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

attach-multiple-files-to-pdf.title: Attach Multiple Files to a PDF
attach-multiple-files-to-pdf.description: Shows how to iterate through a directory of files and add each one as an attachment to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfContentEditor.

enable-displaydoctitle-viewer-preference.title: Enable DisplayDocTitle to Show PDF Title in Window Caption
enable-displaydoctitle-viewer-preference.description: Demonstrates using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfContentEditor to set a PDF document title and enable the DisplayDocTitle viewer preference so the title appears in the viewer's window bar.

retrieve-pdf-viewer-preferences-xml.title: Retrieve PDF Viewer Preferences and Export to XML
retrieve-pdf-viewer-preferences-xml.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with PdfContentEditor, obtaining its viewer preference flags, and saving the value as an XML document for legacy system integration.

set-hide-menubar-viewer-preference.title: Set Hide Menubar Viewer Preference in PDF
set-hide-menubar-viewer-preference.description: Shows how to read a PDF's current viewer preferences, enable the HideMenubar flag, and save the modified document using Aspose.Pdf Facades.

add-bold-red-centered-text-stamp.title: Add Bold Red Centered Text Stamp to PDF Page
add-bold-red-centered-text-stamp.description: Demonstrates how to create a bold, red, center‑aligned text stamp and apply it only to page five of a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf.

add-hyperlink-annotation-to-pdf.title: Add Hyperlink Annotation to Jump Between PDF Pages
add-hyperlink-annotation-to-pdf.description: Shows how to insert a local hyperlink annotation that navigates from a source page to a target page within the same PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfContentEditor.

remove-all-attachments-from-pdf.title: Remove All Attachments from PDF
remove-all-attachments-from-pdf.description: Shows how to delete every embedded attachment in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfContentEditor and save the cleaned document.

add-line-annotation-with-arrowheads.title: Add Line Annotation with Arrowheads to PDF
add-line-annotation-with-arrowheads.description: Shows how to insert a line annotation with arrowheads at both the start and end points of a PDF page using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

set-pdf-viewer-preference-single-page.title: Set PDF Viewer Preference to Single-Page Layout
set-pdf-viewer-preference-single-page.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfContentEditor to change a PDF's viewer preference to single‑page layout and save the modified document.

apply-light-gray-background-to-text-anno.title: Apply Light Gray Background to Text Annotation
apply-light-gray-background-to-text-anno.description: The example loads a PDF, creates a sticky‑note text annotation on the first page, and sets its popup background color to light gray for better readability on dark pages.

add-red-highlight-annotation-to-pdf.title: Add Red Highlight Annotation to PDF
add-red-highlight-annotation-to-pdf.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfContentEditor to create a bright red highlight markup annotation on a specific area of a PDF page.

add-document-attachment-and-list-attachm.title: Add Document Attachment and List Attachments in PDF
add-document-attachment-and-list-attachm.description: Demonstrates adding a file as a document attachment to a PDF using PdfContentEditor and then retrieving and listing all attachment names with PdfExtractor.

underline-specific-phrase-on-fourth-page.title: Underline Specific Phrase on Fourth PDF Page
underline-specific-phrase-on-fourth-page.description: Shows how to search for a given phrase on the fourth page of a PDF and add a red underline annotation using Aspose.Pdf's PdfContentEditor facade.

replace-text-preserve-font-style.title: Replace Text on Page Two While Preserving Font Style
replace-text-preserve-font-style.description: Demonstrates how to locate a specific string on page 2 of a PDF, capture its original TextState (font, size, style, colour), and replace it with new text using the same styling.

replace-text-regex-pdf-pages.title: Replace Text with Regular Expression Across PDF Pages
replace-text-regex-pdf-pages.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf to find and replace text matching a regular expression on all pages of a PDF while preserving the original formatting.

combine-viewer-preferences-pdf.title: Combine PDF Viewer Preferences and Save
combine-viewer-preferences-pdf.description: Shows how to merge multiple viewer preferences such as CenterWindow and HideToolbar using bitwise OR and apply them to a PDF with PdfContentEditor before saving.

add-attachment-store-checksum-metadata.title: Add Attachment and Store Checksum in PDF Metadata
add-attachment-store-checksum-metadata.description: Demonstrates how to embed a file into a PDF, retrieve its MD5 checksum, and store that checksum in the document's metadata for later integrity verification.

rotate-stamp-annotation-90-degrees.title: Rotate Stamp Annotation 90 Degrees Clockwise
rotate-stamp-annotation-90-degrees.description: Demonstrates how to rotate an image stamp by 90° clockwise and apply it to all pages of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

add-image-attachment-and-stamp.title: Add Image Attachment and Stamp to PDF
add-image-attachment-and-stamp.description: Shows how to embed an image file as a document attachment and simultaneously use the same image as a visible stamp on a PDF using Aspose.Pdf facades.

hide-toolbar-and-menubar-viewer-preferen.title: Hide Toolbar and Menubar Viewer Preferences
hide-toolbar-and-menubar-viewer-preferen.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfContentEditor to set the HideToolbar and HideMenubar viewer preferences, producing a minimalistic PDF UI.

batch-add-image-watermark-to-pdfs.title: Batch Add Image Watermark to PDFs
batch-add-image-watermark-to-pdfs.description: Shows how to apply an image watermark to every PDF in a folder using Aspose.Pdf facades with configurable opacity, position, and background settings.

change-pdf-viewer-preferences.title: Change PDF Viewer Preferences and Save
change-pdf-viewer-preferences.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfContentEditor to modify viewer preferences such as hiding the menu bar and disabling page mode outlines, then save the edited PDF to a new file.

set-continuous-view-mode.title: Set Continuous View Mode for PDF
set-continuous-view-mode.description: Shows how to enable continuous scrolling (single column layout) in a PDF by setting the viewer preference using Aspose.Pdf.Facades PdfContentEditor.

add-square-annotation-with-custom-border.title: Add Square Annotation with Custom Border to PDF
add-square-annotation-with-custom-border.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, creating a square annotation, setting a 3‑point border thickness, and saving the modified document.

add-free-text-annotation-custom-appearan.title: Add Free‑Text Annotation with Custom Appearance to PDF
add-free-text-annotation-custom-appearan.description: Shows how to insert a free‑text annotation on a PDF page using Aspose.Pdf, setting Helvetica font, size 12, and blue color via DefaultAppearance.

add-web-link-annotation-to-pdf.title: Add Web Link Annotation to PDF
add-web-link-annotation-to-pdf.description: Shows how to insert a clickable web link annotation into an existing PDF document using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfContentEditor.

add-attachment-set-viewer-preference.title: Add Attachment and Set Viewer Preference in PDF
add-attachment-set-viewer-preference.description: Shows how to attach a file to a PDF and configure the viewer to open the attachments pane using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

set-annotation-opacity.title: Set Annotation Opacity in PDF
set-annotation-opacity.description: Demonstrates how to add a text annotation to a PDF page and set its opacity to 0.5 using Aspose.Pdf.

add-rtl-text-annotation-to-pdf.title: Add RTL Text Annotation to PDF
add-rtl-text-annotation-to-pdf.description: Shows how to bind an existing PDF, create a right‑to‑left (Arabic) sticky‑note text annotation, and save the updated document using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

replace-draft-with-final-in-pdf.title: Replace "Draft" with "Final" in a PDF
replace-draft-with-final-in-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF, bind it to a PdfContentEditor, and replace every occurrence of the word "Draft" with "Final" using Aspose.Pdf.

add-highlight-annotation-to-pdf-page.title: Add Highlight Annotation to PDF Page
add-highlight-annotation-to-pdf-page.description: Demonstrates how to add a yellow highlight markup annotation to a specific text region on page three of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

configuration-driven-pdf-editing-pipelin.title: Configuration‑Driven PDF Editing Pipeline
configuration-driven-pdf-editing-pipelin.description: Demonstrates a simple configuration‑driven pipeline that sequentially adds a document attachment, changes a viewer preference, and creates a file‑attachment annotation using Aspose.Pdf's PdfContentEditor facade.

add-tooltip-annotation-to-pdf.title: Add Tooltip Annotation to PDF Using PdfContentEditor
add-tooltip-annotation-to-pdf.description: Shows how to insert a tooltip (text) annotation into an existing PDF file using the Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfContentEditor class.

replace-phrase-with-bold-text.title: Replace Phrase with Bold Text in PDF
replace-phrase-with-bold-text.description: Demonstrates how to replace a specific phrase in a PDF document while applying a bold style to the new text, preserving the original font size, using Aspose.Pdf's content editor.

add-freetext-annotation-with-html.title: Add Free‑Text Annotation with HTML Rich Text to PDF
add-freetext-annotation-with-html.description: Demonstrates how to create a free‑text annotation that renders HTML‑formatted rich text on a PDF page using Aspose.Pdf.

rotate-text-annotation-90-degrees.title: Rotate Text Annotation by 90 Degrees
rotate-text-annotation-90-degrees.description: Shows how to create a text stamp, rotate it 90° and add it as a text annotation to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf facades.

replace-text-on-specific-pdf-page.title: Replace Text on Specific PDF Page
replace-text-on-specific-pdf-page.description: Demonstrates how to replace a given string only on page 3 of a PDF using PdfContentEditor with custom text formatting.

add-popup-annotation-with-bullet-points.title: Add Popup Annotation with Bullet Points
add-popup-annotation-with-bullet-points.description: Shows how to create a multi‑line popup annotation containing bullet points and save the modified PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

add-text-annotation-utc-creation-date.title: Add Text Annotation with UTC Creation Date
add-text-annotation-utc-creation-date.description: Demonstrates creating a text annotation on a PDF page, setting its CreationDate to the current UTC time, and saving the modified document using the PdfAnnotationEditor facade.

lock-pdf-annotation.title: Lock a PDF Annotation to Prevent Editing
lock-pdf-annotation.description: Shows how to create a text annotation in a PDF, set its Locked flag so end users cannot move, resize, or delete it, and save the document using the PdfAnnotationEditor facade.

delete-page-from-pdf.title: Delete a Specific Page from PDF
delete-page-from-pdf.description: Shows how to remove page 5 from a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor and save the modified file.

add-file-attachment-to-encrypted-pdf.title: Add File Attachment to Encrypted PDF
add-file-attachment-to-encrypted-pdf.description: Shows how to open a password‑protected PDF, attach a file without a visual annotation, and save the updated document using Aspose.Pdf.

verify-viewer-preference-persistence.title: Verify Viewer Preference Persistence After Editing PDF
verify-viewer-preference-persistence.description: Creates a PDF, sets a viewer preference using PdfContentEditor, saves it, reopens the file and asserts that the preference remains set.

add-attachment-set-viewer-preferences-en.title: Add Attachment, Set Viewer Preferences, and Encrypt PDF
add-attachment-set-viewer-preferences-en.description: Demonstrates adding a file attachment and changing viewer preferences with PdfContentEditor, then encrypting the PDF with a user password using PdfFileSecurity.

verify-pdf-attachment-after-save.title: Verify PDF Attachment After Save
verify-pdf-attachment-after-save.description: Shows how to add a file attachment to a PDF with PdfContentEditor, save the document, and confirm the attachment exists using PdfExtractor in a unit test.

add-network-attachment-to-pdf-with-retry.title: Add Network Attachment to PDF with Retry Logic
add-network-attachment-to-pdf-with-retry.description: Demonstrates downloading a file from a URL using retry logic and attaching it to an existing PDF with Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfContentEditor.

replace-text-pdf-content-editor-disposal.title: Replace Text in PDF Using PdfContentEditor with Proper Disposal
replace-text-pdf-content-editor-disposal.description: The example loads a PDF, binds it to a PdfContentEditor, replaces all occurrences of a string, saves the result, and ensures the editor is closed in a finally block to release resources.

add-custom-appearance-stream-to-rubber-s.title: Add Custom Appearance Stream to Rubber Stamp Annotation
add-custom-appearance-stream-to-rubber-s.description: Shows how to use PdfContentEditor to add a rubber‑stamp annotation with a custom appearance PDF stream, including platform‑specific handling for GDI+.

annotate-and-merge-pdfs.title: Annotate First PDF and Merge with Second PDF
annotate-and-merge-pdfs.description: Demonstrates adding a text annotation to a PDF with PdfContentEditor, saving the edited file, and then appending a second PDF using the Document class.

async-add-attachment-to-pdf.title: Asynchronously Add Attachment to PDF and Save
async-add-attachment-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to add a file attachment to an existing PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades on a background thread, keeping the UI responsive and supporting cancellation.

apply-viewer-preference-to-multiple-pdfs.title: Apply Viewer Preference to Multiple PDFs
apply-viewer-preference-to-multiple-pdfs.description: Demonstrates how to iterate over a list of PDF files and set the same viewer preference (e.g., hide the menu bar) for each using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

compare-pdf-file-sizes-after-edit.title: Compare PDF File Sizes After Editing
compare-pdf-file-sizes-after-edit.description: Demonstrates editing a PDF by adding a blank page with Aspose.Pdf, then using the PdfFileInfo facade to bind the original and edited files and compare their sizes to verify the changes.

edit-pdf-replace-text-add-link-attachmen.title: Edit PDF: Replace Text, Add Web Link, and Attachment with Logging
edit-pdf-replace-text-add-link-attachmen.description: Demonstrates using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfContentEditor to bind a PDF, replace text, create a web link annotation, add a document attachment, and log each operation with timestamps.

apply-45-degree-rotated-stamp.title: Apply 45° Rotated Stamp Annotation to PDF
apply-45-degree-rotated-stamp.description: Demonstrates creating a formatted text stamp, setting a 45‑degree rotation, and applying it to all pages of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

batch-remove-attachments-add-disclaimer.title: Batch Remove Attachments and Add Disclaimer to PDFs
batch-remove-attachments-add-disclaimer.description: Shows how to iterate through a folder of PDF files, delete all embedded attachments, and place a standardized disclaimer annotation on the first page using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

hide-annotations-fullscreen-preference.title: Hide Annotations When FullScreen Viewer Preference Is Enabled
hide-annotations-fullscreen-preference.description: Demonstrates how to detect the FullScreen viewer preference in a PDF and hide all annotations by setting the Hidden flag, then save the document while preserving the viewer settings.

split-pdf-into-single-page-files.title: Split PDF into Single-Page Files with Annotations
split-pdf-into-single-page-files.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor to split an edited PDF, preserving its annotations, into separate one-page PDF documents.

concurrent-pdf-rotation.title: Concurrent PDF Rotation using Aspose.Pdf
concurrent-pdf-rotation.description: Demonstrates processing a batch of PDF files in parallel, loading each with Aspose.Pdf Document, rotating all pages via PdfPageEditor, and saving the edited PDFs.

export-pdf-annotations-to-json.title: Export PDF Annotations to JSON
export-pdf-annotations-to-json.description: Shows how to extract all annotations from a PDF using PdfAnnotationEditor, convert the XFDF data to a simple JSON structure, and write it to a file.

import-annotations-from-json-to-pdf.title: Import Annotations from JSON into PDF
import-annotations-from-json-to-pdf.description: The example reads annotation definitions from a JSON file, deserializes them, and uses Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfContentEditor to add text annotations to the specified pages of a PDF document.

pdf-editing-wrapper-aspdf-pdfcontentedit.title: PDF Editing Wrapper with Aspose PdfContentEditor
pdf-editing-wrapper-aspdf-pdfcontentedit.description: Demonstrates a disposable wrapper around Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfContentEditor that simplifies common PDF editing operations such as text replacement, adding web‑link annotations, deleting images, and saving the document.

align-stamp-with-text-baseline.title: Align Stamp with Text Baseline on PDF Page
align-stamp-with-text-baseline.description: Demonstrates adding an image stamp to a PDF, extracting the baseline of the first text fragment on page 5, and repositioning the stamp so its baseline aligns with the text.

add-text-watermark-to-pdf.title: Add Text Watermark to PDF Using Aspose.Pdf.Facades
add-text-watermark-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates binding a PDF, creating a formatted text stamp, configuring its visual properties, adding it to all pages, and saving the watermarked document with Aspose.Pdf.Facades.
